scripts.coco4gui:prepare: doppler run -- env PYTHONPATH=.:agent:backend python scripts/prepare_coco4gui_for_vertex.py
scripts.dev: cd apps/web && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:desktop: cd apps/desktop && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.desktop:dist: pnpm run version:desktop && cd apps/desktop && doppler run --config prd -- pnpm run dist
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && doppler run -- env PYTHONPATH=../agent uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:agent: cd agent && doppler run -- uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8083
scripts.dev:mobile: cd apps/mobile && doppler run -- pnpm run start
scripts.dev:mobile:prebuild: cd apps/mobile && doppler run -- pnpm run prebuild
scripts.dev:ios: cd apps/mobile && doppler run -- pnpm run ios
scripts.dev:android: cd apps/mobile && doppler run -- pnpm run android
scripts.dev:livekit-agent: doppler run -- env PYTHONPATH=agent python -m echo_prism_agent.voice.livekit.main dev
